arts.ttl: Boxing Day's Championship predictions including Stoke vs. Leeds
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Stoke vs. Leeds.

arts.ttl: Stoke City boss 'feeling the support' of Jon Walters and John Coates
arts.sum: Narcis Pelach has been given the support of John Coates and Jon Walters this week as he insists he has the energy and belief to turn things around at Stoke City. “I had a long conversation with John Coates (on Monday), another one with Jon Walters and I’m feeling their support,” he said.

arts.ttl: Is Stoke City vs Leeds United on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: Second-place Leeds United travel to the bet365 Stadium to take on struggling Stoke City on Boxing Day. Daniel Farke's side will be hoping to go five games unbeaten and looking to build on the impressive 4-0 home win against Oxford United. When is Stoke City vs Leeds United?

arts.ttl: Leeds United, Manchester United swap deal worth considering amid new transfer update
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier has been linked with a move to Manchester United, and replacing the stopper might be something to consider this January. Manchester United linked with Illan Meslier transfer, been scouting regularly

arts.ttl: Jack Harrison's Leeds United commitment has already been explained amid Everton stance
arts.sum: His form, his salary and Everton's new position mean he looks nailed on for an Elland Road return in the summer, with Leeds knowing if they're not a Premier League club then the clause in the player' contract will allow him to leave again if he can find someone to pick up his entire salary. Meanwhile, Dyche spoke about Harrison recently, he said: “He is still working hard, he’s a very honest professional, and just trying to find those moments for him.

arts.ttl: Leeds United promotion uncertainty as AI predicts Championship table
arts.sum: Leeds United have a great chance at promotion back to the Premier League, but it is by no means guaranteed, according to the Opta Analyst predicted table. Opta have also predicted five other teams to still have a chance of promotion to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ch’ship wages: Leeds, Sheff Utd, Burnley, Sunderland and more
arts.sum: Leeds, despite coming into their second season back in the EFL, have much more muscle than their league rivals in 24/25, but maybe not as much compared to those that have since dropped out of the Premier League in 2024. Leeds United’s second season in the Championship needs to yield promotion for Daniel Farke, with the pressure on to ensure the Whites are in the top two come May.

arts.ttl: Illan Meslier to Manchester United: Would Leeds sell?
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier has been linked with a move away from Elland Road in the January window, with French club Rennes and Manchester United among those said to be interested. Reports from French outlet Jeunes Footeux claimed that Rennes are keen on signing Meslier in the new year as they look to plan for the future without 39-year-old Steve Mandanda.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer news: Aston Villa playmaker to move to Elland Road in January?
arts.sum: Aston Villa may reportedly be prepared to allow one of their fringe playmakers move to a Championship promotion contender during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke outlines Christmas Day Leeds United plans ahead of Stoke City
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke and his squad are preparing as usual for a Boxing Day trip to Stoke City today, as fans around the country celebrate Christmas Day. We’ve drawn a line under an impressive win and we’re now up to deliver a good performance and result on Boxing Day. Tough games are coming up, this is traditionally always a tough away fixture at Stoke.
